Model: Spline
mu_chieff(z) = (x3 + -3.657917289936121) * ((((x8 * 0.12441576620711176) + 0.012717095548110825) * (x0 + abs((x8 * -0.0376729114355761) - -0.026514532820206143))) + -0.02901071115477852)
log sigma_chieff(z) = ((x7 * 0.1485619426105284) * ((x8 * 1.6140823364398638) - ((x8 + 2.3084084470248754) - x5))) - ((x8 * 1.4528147439098549) + 1.500723056735231)
